result: Implementation is complete: `model/model.py` now has two independent from-scratch `SmallTrunk` conv trunks (bright/dark experts) blended by a raw-pixel-stat dispatcher gate, with the joint 1024-way field replaced by independent 32-way row/column classifiers and per-axis 1-D soft-argmax decode. `model/train.py` drops the pretrained-trunk LR split, trains every sampled location at all 4 exact 90° headings per epoch (holding crop budget fixed), and updates the `info["init"]` log string. Verified: forward/backward pass works, ONNX exports at 0.70 MiB (well under the 4 MiB gate), and host latency proxy is ~15 ms (well under 250 ms).
